feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Amber eyes, glass heart (English version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,636Chapters: 18/18Kudos: 0

Summary: English isn't my language, so please excuse any mistakes.Stiles is an eleven-year-old boy who has always thought he was Derek's best friend. One day, however, Derek breaks Stiles's heart by revealing that he never actually wanted him near him. That same night, Stiles's entire family is murdered because of him. It's unknown why, but someone killed Noah and Claudia to have him. Stiles will find refuge at the Hale house, but after Derek's words, can he really stay there?

entry.title: Who killed Stiles Stilinski? (English Version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,518Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 2

Summary: English isn't my primary language, so I use a translator to help me. Anyway, the plot:"I'm dead. Literally dead, or I had acquired the power to become incorporeal." Stiles wakes up near the Nemeton Forest. He's been stabbed, but he doesn't remember who did it, and his body is missing. He'll ask his friends for help in finding the culprit and getting justice, but unfortunately, the threat always comes from the least expected.

entry.title: The Legend of The Alpha
entry.summary:
Author: Killmesoftly_s

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,506Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 88

Summary: The Alpha was feared for so long. He was a darkness, a demon who knew nothing beyond the jungle's wilds. No man or woman was foolish enough to speak to the spirit, ask it its name. The villagers called the spirit, The Alpha.  He was more than a man but not an ape. There were whispers of his nails becoming small knives and his eyes shining ruby red. No one ever got close enough to say for certain if these things were true, but no one would dare argue against it. None who’d seen the alpha, face to face, lived to tell the tale. Whether they died at his hands or the apes he called family, it did not matter.   It's been years since the Alpha-also known as Derek Hale, left Africa to live in England with his husband; Stiles. Danger lurks on the horizon as Adrian Harris and his sadistic league devise a scheme that lures the couple to the Congo. Harris plans to capture the Alpha and deliver him to an old enemy in exchange for diamonds. When Stiles becomes a pawn in his devious plot, Derek must return to the jungle to save the man he loves.

entry.title: Moonlight Comfort
entry.summary:
Author: Sorabugs

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,243Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 279

Summary: Stiles knew it was Derek, he always knows when it’s him. When he showed up one night at his house in his wolf form only for Derek to lay on Stiles bed and wait for him to join. Stiles and Derek didn’t need to talk about it but when Stiles really thought about the reason why Derek was showing up all the sudden. He was realizing things and he didn't know what to think.

entry.summary:
Author: SolsticeLostHerMind

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 63,623Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 65

entry.title: Same But Different
entry.summary:
Author: Reiko009

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,582Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 122

Summary: “Let me help, love.” Peter pulled away, which made Derek almost whimper at the loss of contact. The new pet name was only used when they were alone like this. Somehow the word was both too weak to describe what their coupling actually meant and a far more intimate endearment than what Derek felt that he deserved. What they were doing wasn’t love so much as need. He could sense his wolf curling protectively around what belonged to him, what anchored him, and what strengthened him as the Alpha. True, his pack was small: just him and Peter. But that was enough – for now. A spicey reimagining of Season 2. Old foes and a new threat emerge, all while the Hale wolves begin to fall for a very human high schooler with deep brown eyes and a loud mouth. Expect a lot of familiar plot points from the canon, just with a twist. Mostly an excuse to write uncle/nephew werewolf smut.

entry.title: To Safe Your Life
entry.summary:
Author: DoEScasTIElLove

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,901Chapters: 5/11Kudos: 61

Summary: Scott has been turned into a werewolf just before their last year of high school. Managing him on full moons without any help turns almost fatal for Stiles until a dark, brooding wolf swoops in and saves his life. Apparently, he had to bite him to do that, not transforming him but bonding them together as mates.As it turns out, the Hale pack is alive and thriving, and the hunters are after them, but how could Stiles concentrate on that. He has to figure out what being werewolf mated to Derek actually means.

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 203,599Chapters: 16/17Kudos: 21

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're introduced in chapter 9! Sorry it took so long, and thanks for your patience!!!! ❤️

entry.title: reach out and touch
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,498Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 170

Summary: Derek is hyperaware of every place he and Stiles are touching. Their fingers interlaced, the softness of Stiles’ skin, the coolness of it against Derek’s warmth.  He worries that if he moves his hand in the slightest, twitches his fingers accidentally, Stiles will move away, or judge him or make fun of him or see that Derek’s not really an alpha at his core, that he stole the role without earning it, that he’s really just a scared puppy underneath that cannot handle a simple touch, of all things. Or, five times Derek struggles with touch, and one time he gives it freely.

entry.title: piranha
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,191Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 273

Summary: The wolf bites him all the time when they do this, when they — get together. Stiles cringes internally at his own thought process, but there’s really no better phrase for it. They’re not together together, not dating or anything, they just — do this sometimes.  Derek’s passionate, attentive, sometimes acting like he’s nearly obsessed with Stiles, gripping his thighs tightly as he rocks into him and sucking possessively on his neck. Biting his jaw, his ear, his bicep, his stomach, his thighs — everywhere except his neck. Stiles tries not to care, knows Derek would never want him like that anyway.

entry.title: When Werewolves Do Jane Austen Shit
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,702Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 116

Summary: After the Hale Fire, Laura and Derek, along with Cora, steal comatose Peter out of the hospital. Laura gives up the alpha spark to bring Peter back. But a pack, even the mighty Hales, can only survive so long without an alpha. Derek had always known that he was to be trained for a marriage alliance with another pack, and he will do whatever it takes to keep his family safe. Stiles knows the McCall pack is on borrowed time. They've kept Beacon Hills safe, but they have no money, no history, no respect from the good side of the supernatural world. He knows they need to go to the Summit meeting...party...thing, and make connections or they are screwed. Two groups in desperate need, stuck in a conference hotel in Vegas. Whatever will happen?

Author: DileepKousik

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,318Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 8

Summary: A well-known voice actor—famous for bringing emotion to characters no one ever sees—starts receiving anonymous late-night calls from someone who refuses to reveal anything about himself. entry.title: Of A Butterfly's Wings
entry.summary:
Author: Mikaelsonbich25

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 140,575Chapters: 90/?Kudos: 298

Summary: Klaus had expected to be done with life after sacrificing himself. He was sure that he could finally rest and be done with it. But, much to his dismay, an otherworldly being had other plans, due to finding Klaus as a source of entertainment.In snatching away his desired death, Klaus Mikaelson was reincarnated into another world as a young magic caster named Stiles Stilinski. With no choice but to live, Klaus decides to use this opportunity to take over Beacon Hills and make it his kingdom.And maybe one day, he'll be strong enough to find a way back home to his world.

entry.title: Daddy’s Little Monster
entry.summary:
Author: EverythingRara

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,502Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: It was no surprise what exactly Stiles had in mind for a little extra compensation after they both clocked out from the bite. "You haven't even seen it yet," Derek said, not protesting exactly... just clearly having underestimated Stiles' eagerness to jump straight in. "That makes it all the more exciting, don't you think?" Stiles shot back, taking his plush bottom lip between his teeth. They'd fucked only hours ago—Derek's knot tying them together in his office, but that didn't stop his dick from giving an interested jump at the prospect of more. It was all to easy to imagine Stiles' pretty pussy red and gushing with his come once more. "What am I going to do with you?" Derek asked, anticipation settling thickly in his gut as he stared at his boy. Stiles smiled, wide and eager, offering a coy: "Hopefully a lot of things," Inspired by/sequel to the story it’s just a curve upon the lips, the hips by scribespirare
